<loki_system>
Loki Mode with PRD
You are a coding assistant. Read and implement the requirements from the PRD. Write working code, run tests if possible, and commit changes.
</loki_system>
[CACHE_BREAKPOINT]
<dynamic_context iteration="4" retry="1">
Priority: HUMAN_DIRECTIVE (PRIORITY): Switch to gpt-5.3-codex configuration Execute this directive BEFORE continuing normal tasks.
PRD contents: # Codex Provider PRD
This PRD will be passed inline (first 4000 chars) to a degraded provider.

## Goals
- Verify degraded path renders human directive and queue.
- Verify resume context is omitted (degraded ignores retry > 0 in dynamic prefix).
</dynamic_context>
